title: EnvironmentZ + Terralith Compat
description: Terralith/EnvironmentZ Compatibility datapack/mod based on recommended values from Terralith's wiki.
body: [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) and [EnvironmentZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmentz) Compatibility datapack/mod that applies recommended overworld temperature values from [Terralith’s Wiki](https://stardustlabs.miraheze.org/wiki/Terralith#List_of_compatible_Fabric/Quilt_Mods) for you!
